title: Rockhampton, Queensland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Rockhampton is a city in Queensland with a population of 80,665. Central Queensland’s beef capital with the Fitzroy River, Great Keppel Island, and historic architecture.
